sections.paragraph:
ἐποκέλλω 1 aor. ἐπώκειλα (Hdt. 6, 16; 7, 182; Thu. 4, 26, 6; Arrian, Anab. 5, 20, 9 a ship) run aground τὴν ναῦν Ac 27:41 v.l. (for ἐπέκειλαν; s. ἐπικέλλω [κέλλω= ‘put to shore’]).

aor. aor. = aorist

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Thu Thu , V b.c.—List 5

Arrian Arrian = Flavius Arrianus, I–II a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 387
